column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with a strong track record of reliability, hitting safely in three-quarters of his games and showing a recent uptick at the plate. He draws a favorable matchup against Zac Gallen with the platoon advantage and a slight park boost, making him a steady choice for Beat The Streak. Elly De La Cruz also offers consistency with a high hit rate and favorable splits. Yandy Diaz and Bobby Witt Jr. round out the top options, but Arraez stands out for overall dependability.
